rows.label: tlk45310158_01_msg0001
rows.name:
At the top of this elevator is Alba
Margen, the imperial capital.

rows.label: tlk45310158_01_msg0002
rows.name:
You can buy top quality Core Chips
and accessories there, made using
cutting- edge Superbian technology.

rows.label: tlk45310158_01_msg0003
rows.name:
Any Driver should visit that
place at least once.

rows.label: tlk45310158_01_msg0004
rows.name:
Most food in the Imperial
Capital is pretty awful, but
Quoteletta is worth trying.

rows.label: tlk45310158_01_msg0005
rows.name:
Listen, don't eat Kascha.
That gruel is truly bizarre...
